name: quota-sentry
description: Codex quota guard that monitors 5-hour and weekly usage windows and waits near reset.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex quota and wait before a configured window is exhausted.
interface.longDescription: Quota Sentry is a local Codex helper that uses Codex app-server rate-limit data to monitor Codex 5-hour and weekly quota windows, runs a background poller every five minutes by default, records weekly usage as advisory status, and provides a synchronous guard command for Codex hooks or wrappers to wait until reset when usage reaches a configured hard-block threshold.
defaultPrompt: Set up Quota Sentry for Codex.
Check my Codex quota guard status.
